overview.description: AI-powered influencer and social media analytics platform for brands and content creators
overview.description_long: Carl Data Company builds data and AI-driven tools to help brands and content creators measure, understand, and maximize the impact of influencer marketing and social media. Their flagship product, Carl for Social Business, offers real-time influencer tracking, campaign evaluation, and competitor analysis. They also offer Carl for Social — a virtual data assistant for content creators — and provide bespoke data consulting services including web analytics, data integration, predictive modeling, and automation.
overview.tagline: Tvoříme svět, kde si influenceři a značky rozumějí. Díky datům. (We create a world where influencers and brands understand each other. Through data.)

history.origin_story: Founded in 2023 in Prague to connect influencers and brands through data and AI, bridging the transparency gap in influencer marketing.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague as Carl Data Company (legal entity: Czech Video Center a.s.)
Pivoted focus from media houses to influencer marketing; surpassed 13,000 users by August
CEO Jakub Šiler attended SXSW Austin as part of Czech Ministry of Industry business mission
Reached ~26,000 users and ~100 B2B clients by year end
Participated in Royal Mail Christmas influencer campaign

metadata.notes: Legal entity is Czech Video Center a.s. (IČO: 09839194, DIČ: CZ09839194). Office address: Zenwork Palác Ara, Perlová 5, 110 00 Praha 1. ~30 employees per LinkedIn (Nov 2024). ~100 B2B clients and ~26,000 platform users by end of 2025. Also operates cfsbusiness.com for the B2B product.

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Domain-specific focus (data_engineering) with proprietary tech or established customer base provides moat against foundation model commoditization.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Established customer base with proven market demand.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No public funding information. Sustainability unclear.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Strong position across assessed risk dimensions with clear moats or stability factors.
